features.name: async_reset_ff_no_initial_edge
features.description: Code should include a flip-flop with asynchronous reset where the reset is driven by an internal flip-flop output and the reset signal does not toggle at time 0

features.name: sync_deassert_async_assert_reset_controller
features.description: Code should include a reset controller that asynchronously asserts its output but synchronously deasserts it, creating a scenario where the reset signal only transitions once during simulation

extraction_summary.note: No code blocks in issue body; features derived from design description (external async reset -> reset controller (async assert/sync deassert) -> flip-flop with async reset)
